post_fix_for: VIB-3587 Curve single-sided LP_OPEN declares funded legs (no zero-leg)
_provenance.note: Re-baselined for VIB-3587: the lp_curve fixture now deposits SINGLE-SIDED (USDC only, coin idx 1) so the matrix exercises the single-sided leg shape. The Curve connector DECLARES typed PrimitiveMoneyLegs for its funded coin(s) and the ledger dispatcher consumes them, so the LP_OPEN row books token_in=USDC/amount_in=10 with NO fabricated zero leg (the unfunded DAI/USDT coins are ABSENT, not measured-zero). The LPOpenEventPayload was widened to amount0/amount1 = Decimal|None (mirrors VIB-5117 on LP_CLOSE) so the unfunded coin's None no longer FAILs Pydantic, which unblocked G13/LP4. Forward vs the two-sided baseline: G13 FAIL->PASS, G14 XFAIL->PASS, G15 XFAIL->PASS, LP5 XFAIL->PASS (passed 11->15). LP1/LP2/LP6 are concentrated-liquidity cells (ticks / in-range-time / liquidity-over-time) that DO NOT APPLY to a fungible Curve StableSwap pool and are inapplicable-FAIL here, unchanged by this fix. G6 (native-gas-in-equity, VIB-4256) and LP4 (single-sided IL undefined -> XFAIL) are out of scope for VIB-3587.
